> **When to use this file:** When parsing a DepositResponse file returned by bpost to determine the status of deposit actions (create, update, delete, validate) and to interpret error/warning messages.

# Deposit Response File

Deposit Response files are always generated by bpost. The root tag is `<DepositResponse>`.

**Important:** The Response file generated by bpost (and not E-mail) is the unique relevant notification determining the correct end of the process.

In a deposit response file there is a mandatory context tag, a mandatory header tag, optional reply tags and action tags. The Replies tag appears if context errors are found in the request file or if messages need to be returned. The action tags appear for every corresponding action in the request file, including a status and associated replies if applicable.

See [deposit-request.md](deposit-request.md) for the request file this responds to.
See [../errors/deposit-error-codes.md](../errors/deposit-error-codes.md) for MPW-xxxx codes.

## Global Structure

### XML Structure (Tag Level Hierarchy)

| Level 1 | Level 2 | Level 3 | Level 4 | Level 5 | Level 6 | Level 7 |
|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| Context | | | | | | |
| Header | | | | | | |
| | CustomerRefs | | | | | |
| | | CustomerRef (#N) | | | | |
| | Files | | | | | |
| | | RequestProps | | | | |
| Replies | | | | | | |
| | Reply(#N) | | | | | |
| | | XPath | | | | |
| | | Locations | | | | |
| | | | Location (#N) | | | |
| | | Messages | | | | |
| | | | Message (#N) | | | |
| | | | | Description | | |
| | | | | MessageContents | | |
| | | | | | MessageContent(#N) | |
| DepositCreate (#N) | | | | | | |
| | Status | | | | | |
| | CustomerRefs | | | | | |
| | | CustomerRef (#N) | | | | |
| | Replies | | | | | |
| DepositValidate (#N) | | Same as DepositCreate | | | | |
| DepositUpdate (#N) | | Same as DepositCreate | | | | |
| DepositDelete (#N) | | Same as DepositCreate | | | | |

### TXT Structure

```
Context
  Header
    CustomerRef
    RequestProps
    Reply
      Location
      Message
        Description
        MessageContent
  DepositCreate
    Status
    CustomerRef
    Reply
      ...
  DepositValidate
    Status
    CustomerRef
    Reply
      ...
  DepositUpdate
    Status
    CustomerRef
    Reply
      ...
  DepositDelete
    Status
    CustomerRef
    Reply
      ...
```

---

## Context Tag

### XML Structure

| Tag Name | Attributes | Description | Rule | Mandatory | Type | Max Length | Default |
|----------|-----------|-------------|------|-----------|------|------------|---------|
| Context | requestName | A constant identifying the request | Must be 'DepositResponse' | Yes | String | | |
| | dataset | | Must be 'M004_MPA' | Yes | String | | |
| | sender | Required by the File Handling System | Must be 'EMP' | Yes | String | | |
| | receiver | The PRS-ID of the PBC of the sender | Must match the customer identifier in the file name | Yes | Num | 8 | |
| | version | The file version (= 0100) | Must match the file version in the file name | Yes | String | 4 | |

### TXT Structure

```
Context|requestName|dataset|sender|receiver|version
```

---

## Header Tag

### XML Structure

| Tag Name | Attributes | Description | Rule | Mandatory | Type | Max Length | Default |
|----------|-----------|-------------|------|-----------|------|------------|---------|
| Header | customerId | The PRS-ID of the PBC of the sender | Must match the customer identifier in the file name | Yes | Number | 8 | |
| CustomerRefs | | | | No | | | |
| CustomerRefs/CustomerRef (#N) | key | Customer-owned field | | No | String | 250 | |
| | value | Customer-owned field | | Yes | String | 250 | |
| Files | | | | | | | |
| Files/RequestProps | fileName | The file name of the request file | Will match the actual full name of the request file | Yes | String | 100 | |
| | customerFileRef | | Needs to match the 10 N's of the original file name | Yes | String | 10 | |

### TXT Structure

```
Header|customerId
CustomerRef|key|value
RequestProps|fileName|customerFileRef
```

---

## Action Tags

For each action (DepositCreate, DepositUpdate, DepositDelete, DepositValidate), the Response file describes a unique identifier, a status, customer references, and optional replies.

### XML Structure

| Tag Name | Attributes | Description | Rule | Mandatory | Type | Max Length | Default |
|----------|-----------|-------------|------|-----------|------|------------|---------|
| DepositCreate | seq | The sequence number of the DepositCreate action in the request file | | Yes | Num | 8 | |
| | depositRef | The deposit reference that was supplied in the request file | | Yes | String | 20 | |
| | depositIdentifierType | Type of depositIdentifier | depositRef or tmpDepositNr | | String | | depositRef |
| DepositCreate/Status | code | Status code | See [../errors/status-codes.md](../errors/status-codes.md) | Yes | String | 10 | |
| DepositCreate/CustomerRefs/CustomerRef (#N) | key | Value copied from the request file | | Yes | String | 50 | |
| | value | Value copied from the request file | | Yes | String | 250 | |

### TXT Structure

```
DepositCreate|seq|depositRef
Status|code
CustomerRef|key|value
Reply -> See replies tag description below
```

---

## Replies Tag

Replies tags are used wherever errors or messages are returned. Each reply is related to a specific location in the Request file. A reply may contain one or more messages.

### XML Structure

| Tag Name | Attributes | Description | Rule | Mandatory | Type | Max Length | Default |
|----------|-----------|-------------|------|-----------|------|------------|---------|
| Replies | | | | No | | | |
| Replies/Reply (#N) | seq | Sequence number of the reply | | Yes | Num | 8 | |
| Replies/Reply/XPath | | XPath expression identifying the exact location | | Yes | String | 50 | |
| Replies/Reply/Locations | | | | No | | | |
| Replies/Reply/Locations/Location | tagName | Name of the tag | | Yes | String | 50 | |
| | attributeName | Name of the tag attribute that uniquely identifies the element | | No | String | 50 | |
| | attributeValue | Value of the attribute to look for | | No | String | 250 | |
| Replies/Reply/Messages | | | | Yes | | | |
| Replies/Reply/Messages/Message | code | Message code | See [../errors/status-codes.md](../errors/status-codes.md) | Yes | String | 10 | |
| | severity | Message severity | FATAL, ERROR, WARN, INFO | Yes | String | 10 | |
| Replies/Reply/Messages/Message/Description | | Extra information | | No | String | 50 | |
| Replies/Reply/Messages/Message/MessageContents/MessageContent | key | Extra info key | | Yes | String | 50 | |
| | value | Extra info value | | Yes | String | 250 | |

### TXT Structure

```
Reply|seq
Location|tagName|attributeValue
Message|code|severity
Description|description
MessageContent|key|value
```

---

## MessageContent Keys

| Action | MessageContent Key | Description |
|--------|-------------------|-------------|
| **DepositCreate** | tmpDepositNumber | The temporary number of the created deposit. Only appears when the action was successful. |
| | price | The price calculated by MassPost |
| **DepositValidate** | depositNumber | The final deposit number. Only appears when the action was successful. |
| | price | The price calculated by MassPost |
| **DepositUpdate** | price | The price calculated by MassPost |
| **DepositDelete** | *(No MessageContent)* | |

---

## XML Validation

For formal XML validation, use the XSD schema directly:

**Download:** [DepositResponse.xsd](../resources/DepositResponse.xsd)
